title: Hieracium neostenophyllum
taxonomy: Hieracium neostenophyllum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is a member of the subgenus Hieracium, which is further divided into various species based on their morphology and characteristics. As part of the Asteraceae family, Hieracium neostenophyllum is closely related to other plants such as dandelions and hawkweeds. Further classification of Hieracium neostenophyllum may involve its placement within a specific genus or section within the sunflower family.

Traditionally, Hieracium has been used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are said to aid in reducing pain and inflammation.
